title: Crop harvest
description:
Easy harvesting!
Right click on the harvest to harvest it
body:
### This plugin adds a new way of harvesting!

YouTube preview - [click](https://youtu.be/TrL2GPofczU)

Right-click on the harvest, and you have the harvest in your inventory

### List of available crops:
 - Wheat
 - Carrot
 - Potato
 - Beetroot
 - Cocao
 - Nether Wart
